title: Synopsys Stock Floats In Buy Zone After Revealing AI-Based Chip Design Tool
text: Chip design software maker Synopsys has gotten a boost from investor enthusiasm for artificial intelligence technology. The post Synopsys Stock Floats In Buy Zone After Revealing AI-Based Chip Design Tool appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Synopsys spreads AI throughout its chip design tools
text: Synopsys Inc on Wednesday rolled out new artificial intelligence tools designed to get better results faster in the various stages of designing computing chips.

title: Synopsys deepens AI push with new tools
text: Synopsys Inc. SNPS is the latest tech company to deepen its dive into artificial intelligence. On Wednesday, the company launched Synopsys.ai, a suite of AI-driven solutions for design verification, testing and manufacturing of the most advanced digital and analog chips.

title: Synopsys.ai Unveiled as Industry's First Full-Stack, AI-Driven EDA Suite for Chipmakers
text: Market Leaders to Share Perspectives on AI in Design, Analog, Verification, Test and Manufacturing at Synopsys Users Group Conference SANTA CLARA, Calif. , March 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Key Highlights: Synopsys.ai provides AI-driven solutions for chip design, with digital and analog, verification, test and manufacturing components.

title: Analysts Agree Now's The Time To Buy These 10 Promising Stocks
text: Finding S&P 500 stocks that analysts agree on is rare. So when you see nearly unanimous agreement on some, that's quite a statement.

title: ASML, TSMC, and Synopsys Are Partnering With Nvidia to Revolutionize the Chip Manufacturing Process
text: Nvidia recently announced cuLitho, software that improves computational lithography. Computational lithography is needed to continue the development of advanced semiconductors.

title: Synopsys (SNPS) Up 4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Synopsys (SNPS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: World's Biggest Chip Design Technology Users Event Reopens Live in Silicon Valley
text: Semiconductor Industry Luminaries Will Share Perspectives on the Latest Chip and System Design Thinking as Synopsys SNUG Conference Returns In-person on March 29, 2023 Key Highlights: SNUG Silicon Valley runs March 29 to 30 at the Santa Clara Convention Center, California, with around 2,000 live attendees expected. The follow-on global SNUG roadshow is set to attract 12,000, making SNUG the world's most influential EDA technology users conference.

title: Synopsys: Downgrading To Hold On Valuation, Soft Technicals
text: Semi stocks have surged relative to the S&P 500 in the last five months. With a major rally and amid modestly bearish technicals, I'm downgrading Synopsys to a hold.

title: Is Chip Design Specialist Synopsys A Gem Hiding In Plain Sight?
text: Shares of chip design software maker Synopsys Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS) have been forming a potentially constructive consolidation since its first-quarter earnings report on February 15.
